applied.positive_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension, photographic documentary realism, Upper launch-tower service level before dawn, one engineer proxy in a weather jacket stands at a side-mounted terminal inside the tower, natural human body proportions, medium full-body side profile, the entire exterior opening behind him is filled by the middle section of the orange external tank like a vertical wall, no visible booster, no visible sky, no visible bottom of the tank, no lower tank curve, no outside catwalk view beyond him, only dark interior tower framing at the edges, terminal screen unreadable and dim, cold damp air, sodium work light, restrained documentary tension

notes: Derived from the official ComfyUI Flux.2 Dev text-to-image workflow.
Adapted to expose negative_prompt, batch_size, seed, and filename_prefix for this lab.
The negative prompt branch is retained as an unconnected CLIPTextEncode node because the official FLUX.2 Dev text-to-image path is positive-guidance-first.
Export-time model loader filenames are patched from FluxLab runtime config so local-safe checkpoints can replace the official quantized default.
